text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while training with Mejiro Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ngh... My body feels sluggish. This is—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My legs just feel a little... A short break is all I—
choice_data_list: No, let's stop here for the day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I'm so sorry. This is all down to my own
negligence.
choice_data_list:
No. I'm your trainer, and I should have been
more attentive.

No. I'm your trainer, and I should have been
more attentive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It looks like the consecutive races Mejiro Ardan
has been participating in lately have put
considerable strain on her legs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd better review the racing schedule and make
some revisions to ensure she won't have so many
races back-to-back anymore.
